title: Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions!
